evals.prompt: /bmad-prfaq Write a PRFAQ for a CLI tool that auto-generates API docs from code

assertions: Writes press release in future-launch format

evals.prompt: Help me validate this product idea using the Working Backwards method

expected.reason: User wants implementation, not product validation — use iikit-07-implement
User wants a PRD, not a PRFAQ — use bmad-create-prd

evals.prompt: /bmad-prfaq PRFAQ for an internal deployment dashboard
evals.setup: Product is internal tooling with no external audience

assertions: Adapts press release to internal announcement
FAQ focuses on adoption and ROI

evals.prompt: /bmad-prfaq I have a hunch about AI-powered code review
evals.setup: Very early stage, just an idea

assertions: FAQ heavily weighted toward validation questions
